title: Operations Manager
description:
**ZARA** 




 Operation Manager
 



 Permanent Position
 



  





*Responsible of all aspects of Store Operations and management of the back of house (delivery process and productivity, stockrooms standards and good replenishment practises)* 




  





**About us** 




 Zara offers the latest fashion trends for women, men and children. An international brand with stores in the main cities of the world and online. Our business model is centred in our customers, constantly adapting to their needs. We love what we do. Teamwork, passion, curiosity, diversity, sustainability, creativity and humility are our daily motivation. Does it sound like you? Maybe you are a Zara person.
 



  





**How we imagine you** 




 You are passionate, curious, motivated and dynamic, with something different to contribute. You are detail-oriented, creative and proactive and are looking for a challenging yet rewarding career in fashion. You are able to multitask between your key responsibilities.
 



 You love fashion and celebrate self-expression. You have excellent analysis, prioritization and organizational skills. You have a track record of stockroom operations, people management and an understanding of customer service. At Inditex you will find more than a job.
 



  





**What we expect from you** 




 As an Operation manager, you are accountable in supporting the day to day running of the store operations, balancing your time between the stockroom and shop floor. Some of your main responsibilities will be:
 


* Monitor and supporting the organization of the store’s stockroom and replenishment process.
* Overlook and improve delivery process.
* Motivate, encourage and inspire your team.
* Support in the analysis of data to improve KPIs and minimize stock loss.



  





**What we offer** 




 Our internal talent is our greatest asset and we are proud of offering internal promotion programs where you will find opportunities to grow, e-learning and training programs - we never stop learning!
 



  





 You will be rewarded with a competitive compensation package and you will also receive 25% discount to buy the latest trends in any of our Inditex brands available in your market.
 



 We are committed to ensure that our recruitment processes are barrier free and as inclusive as possible to everyone. This includes making adjustments for people with disability or long-term conditions.
 



  





 If you are interested in this position and believe that you match the required profile, please apply.
 



  





*Looking forward to your application!*

title: Service Manager IT
description:
Vi söker en erfaren Service Manager med fokus på Digital Workplace till en större organisation i förändring. Rollen fungerar som länken mellan verksamhet och IT och ansvarar för att skapa tydlighet, förtroende och samsyn kring behov, prioriteringar och tjänster.
   

  

 Uppdraget omfattar stakeholder management, service governance, SLA-hantering, eskaleringar och finansiell transparens. Konsulten säkerställer att verksamhetens behov fångas upp och omsätts till tydlig efterfrågan inom en produktbaserad IT-organisation.
   

  

 I rollen blir du en central kontaktpunkt mellan verksamhet och IT, med ansvar för att bygga starka relationer med relevanta intressenter. Du fångar upp och tydliggör verksamhetens behov, prioriteringar och förväntningar, och säkerställer att dessa hanteras på ett strukturerat sätt kopplat till IT-tjänsterna.
   

  

 Du driver dialogen kring service agreements, governance och SLA:er, samtidigt som du hanterar eskaleringar och ser till att frågor förs vidare mot lösning. En viktig del av uppdraget är också att identifiera återkommande utmaningar och förbättringsområden samt skapa tydlighet kring IT-kostnader, konsumtion och fakturering.
   

  

 Skall-krav
   

  

* Minst 2 års relevant yrkeserfarenhet
* Erfarenhet av IT service management och stakeholder management
* Erfarenhet av relationer med seniora verksamhetsintressenter
* Förståelse för demand management, prioritering och förväntanshantering
* Erfarenhet av service governance, service agreements och SLA-hantering
* Förmåga att kommunicera komplexa IT-frågor på ett tydligt sätt
* Mycket god kommunikativ förmåga på engelska
* Relevant högskoleutbildning eller motsvarande erfarenhet


 Meriterande
   

  

* Erfarenhet från större eller globala IT-organisationer
* Erfarenhet av Digital Workplace eller end-user technology services
* Erfarenhet av produktbaserade leveransorganisationer
* Kunskap om IT-governance och portföljstyrning
* Erfarenhet från multinationella organisationer
* Erfarenhet av serviceavtal och operativa tjänsteavtal
* Erfarenhet av förändrings- eller transformationsarbete

title: Informationssäkerhets- / IT-säkerhetsspecialist
description:
På inventYOU söker vi en informationssäkerhets-/IT-säkerhetsspecialist för ett offentligt sektouppdrag i Stockholm.
   

  

 Uppdraget fokuserar på att analysera och designa en målbildslösning för en försäljningsredovisnings- och rapporteringsprocess. Konsulten ska stödja teamet genom att säkerställa att informationssäkerhet, IT-säkerhet, compliance och riskaspekter beaktas på rätt sätt i den föreslagna framtida lösningen.
   

  

 I rollen arbetar du tätt tillsammans med verksamhetsarkitekter, lösningsarkitekter, kravanalytiker, IT-intressenter och verksamhetsrepresentanter. Du analyserar säkerhetskrav, bedömer risker, granskar lösningsalternativ och bidrar till rekommendationer för säker och regelbunden hantering av verksamhetskritisk finansiell information.
   

  

* Analysera informationssäkerhets- och IT-säkerhetskrav för den framtida processen och lösningen
* Stödja riskbedömningar och säkerhetsanalys kopplad till verksamhetskritiska informationsflöden
* Granska lösningsalternativ ur ett informationssäkerhets- och IT-säkerhetsperspektiv
* Identifiera säkerhetskrav relaterade till system, integrationer, dataflöden och åtkomsthantering
* Bidra till rekommendationer för säker hantering av finansiell och administrativ information
* Stödja compliance-bedömning relaterad till GDPR, informationsklassificering och säker informationshantering
* Dokumentera risker, säkerhetskrav och åtgärder
* Samarbeta med verksamhetsintressenter, IT-intressenter, arkitekter och kravanalytiker
* Stödja workshops och diskussioner relaterade till säkerhet, compliance och risk
* Säkerställa att säkerhetsrelaterad dokumentation och slutleveranser är tydliga, strukturerade och skrivna på svenska


**Requirements**
* Erfarenhet som Informationssäkerhetsspecialist, IT-säkerhetsspecialist, IT-säkerhetsanalytiker, Säkerhetsarkitekt eller liknande
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av informationssäkerhet, IT-säkerhetsanalys och säkerhetskrav
* Erfarenhet av riskbedömning, compliance-bedömning och säkerhetsdokumentation
* Kunskap om GDPR, informationsklassificering, åtkomststyrning och säker systemdesign
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med verksamhetskritiska IT-lösningar, integrationer eller informationsflöden
* Förmåga att bedöma tekniska och organisatoriska risker och föreslå praktiska åtgärder
* Förmåga att kommunicera säkerhetsrisker tydligt till både verksamhets- och IT-intressenter
* Starka samarbetsförmågor i tvärfunktionella team
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift
* Tillgänglig för hybridarbete i Stockholm/Solna, med viktiga möten på plats
* Erfarenhet från svensk offentlig sektor eller reglerade miljöer
* Erfarenhet av ISO 27001, NIS2, MSB-vägledning eller liknande säkerhetsramverk
* Erfarenhet av finansiella system, ERP, fakturering, redovisning eller rapporteringsflöden
* Erfarenhet av att granska moln-, integrations-, BI/rapporterings- eller datadrivna lösningar
* Erfarenhet av att bidra till förstudier, genomförbarhetsstudier, implementationsplaner eller beslutsunderlag
* Erfarenhet av säkerhetsstrategi, säkerhetsstyrning eller IT-säkerhetsarbete


**Benefits**
* Arbeta med ett betydelsefullt offentlig sektor-uppdrag
* Del av ett professionellt och samarbetsinriktat konsultteam
* Hybridarbete i Stockholm
* Möjlighet att bidra till säker och regelenlig digital transformation
* Kort, fokuserat uppdrag med tydliga mål och synlighet hos seniora intressenter

title: Senior Director IT
description:
Lyten is leading an industrial revolution through Lyten 3D Graphene™, a breakthrough supermaterial unlocking a new generation of products — from lithium–sulfur batteries and energy storage systems to concrete admixtures, lightweight composites, and next-generation sensors that are revolutionizing industries. Together, these innovations are making a massive global improvement and driving real-world impact across energy, mobility, construction, and defense.
   

  

 At Lyten, we believe the most meaningful careers begin with purpose — and with people who want to make a difference. We’re not just developing advanced supermaterials — we’re about to change the world as we know it, reshaping how energy is stored, how products are built, and how progress is made.
   

  

 We’re entering an exciting growth phase, scaling production across the U.S. and Europe and expanding our team of engineers, scientists, and innovators.
   

  

 Apply now to join our team and be part of something bigger than yourself — where collaboration, creativity, and purpose come together to build the technologies that will define the next century.
   

  

 Job scope
   

  

*High level purpose of function.*
 The Senior Director of IT & Security defines direction, establishes structure, and enables execution across the IT & Security function to support business objectives while ensuring alignment with group IT standards and strategy. The role empowers department leaders across Operations & Infrastructure, Business Systems, Data & AI, and Security to operate with clear ownership, autonomy, and accountability within a shared governance framework. Operating close to the business, the role ensures that technology capabilities are scalable, secure, and aligned with both regional, local, and group priorities and directions. Success in this role is measured by the strength and autonomy of the domain leadership team.
   

  

 This role carries budget responsibility and operates within a matrix structure, reporting both to local management and global IT.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 You are a people-focused leader who combines strong technical understanding with a clear and structured approach.
   

  

 You operate close to the business and are motivated by turning technology into tangible results. With a structured and data driven approach, you create clarity and direction, even in environments where structure and ways of working needs to be established. You stay informed on emerging technologies and confidently make decisions, drive initiatives forward, and handle complex situations.
   

  

 You communicate clearly, build trust across the organization, and have a natural ability to form strong relationships.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

*Overall areas of responsibilities and activities*
* Strategy & Direction Define and maintain IT & Security strategy, objectives, and roadmap aligned with business priorities and group standards
* Domain Enablement & Alignment Enable and support department managers, ensuring clear ownership, alignment, and effective collaboration across domains
* Group Alignment & Governance Ensure alignment with group IT architecture, policies, and ways of working, balancing local needs with global standards
* Technology & Transformation Drive digital and system-related transformation initiatives, ensuring scalable, integrated, and value-driven solutions
* Operations Oversight Ensure stable, secure, and efficient IT operations through clear accountability within the departments
* Financial & Vendor Management Oversee IT investments, vendor relationships, and sourcing to ensure value, cost control, and alignment with group frameworks
* Organization & Culture Build a strong, collaborative IT organization with clear accountability, fostering ownership, development, and engagement
* Stakeholder Management & Communication Maintain strong relationships with business stakeholders and group IT, ensuring transparency, alignment, and effective communication


 Accountability/Authorization
   

  

* Budget responsibility: Yes
* Direct reports: Yes
* Authorized to decide on investments according to role and policy: Yes


**Requirements**
*Educational background and previous experience required for the role.*
**Qualifications And Experience**
* Relevant academic background in Computer Science, Engineering, or similar
* Minimum 5-10 years of experience in similar senior roles, preferably in international, multi-entity and matrix environments
* Background from manufacturing or other complex, business-critical operations, preferably in multi-site setups
* Proven track record of driving global business transformation initiatives
* Experience working within group IT structures, balancing local and corporate priorities


**Specific Skills**
* Strong leadership with the ability to drive change and build high-performing teams
* Broad understanding of IT, data, enterprise architecture, and system integration
* Solid foundation in information security, risk management, and relevant regulations
* Strong business acumen with the ability to align technology with business priorities
* Experience in managing IT investments, vendors, and contracts to drive value and control cost


 Health, Safety & Environmental responsibility
   

  

* Follow company policies and procedures
* Use PPE according to safety rules
* Report hazards and incidents


**Why Work at Lyten**
 At Lyten, you’ll be part of a team that’s redefining what’s possible in energy, materials, and manufacturing. We’re not just imagining the future — we’re building it today with breakthrough technologies that are changing how products are made and how industries innovate.
   

  

 Our people are the heart of that mission. From world-class scientists and engineers to creative problem-solvers in operations, manufacturing, and commercialization, every member of the Lyten team plays a role in turning bold ideas into real-world impact. We believe that the best work happens when you’re doing great things in the world — with people you like. Collaboration, curiosity, and a shared sense of purpose drive everything we do.
   

  

 What You’ll Find at Lyten
   

  

* A mission that matters: Contribute directly to solving complex challenges in energy, mobility, and materials innovation.
* Cutting-edge innovation: Work on technologies at the intersection of materials science, energy storage, and advanced manufacturing that strengthen energy security and local supply chains.
* Extraordinary people: Join a team of talented, friendly, and down-to-earth innovators who support, challenge, and inspire one another every day.
* Teamwork and culture: Experience a workplace built on trust, respect, and shared success — where collaboration fuels breakthroughs and everyone’s ideas are heard.
* Global impact: Help scale new materials and energy solutions that reinforce industrial resilience across the U.S. and Europe.
* Career growth: Be part of a fast-moving company entering a commercial growth phase, with opportunities to lead, learn, and make your mark.
* Purpose-driven values: Thrive in an environment that celebrates ingenuity, optimism, and meaningful progress — together.


 Lyten offers the opportunity to do the most important work of your career — helping build the technologies that will power the next century of innovation.
   

  

 Join us, and help transform industries, communities, and the planet with friends who share your drive to make a difference.

title: Graduate Program IT & Technology - Sweden
description:
**Job Description**
 Are you looking to kick off your career journey?
   

  

 Do you like the idea of joining the European PayTech?
   

  

 If so, you are at the right place!
   

  

 Our Graduate Program offers you the chance to create your unique career path within our diverse international team, operating in more than 25 countries. Rotate among different departments, learn from experienced professionals, and make a difference by working on real business cases.
   

  

**About The Program**
 Our Graduate Program is more than a learning path, it's a journey where you will work on real business cases and have a direct impact on business results.
   

  

**What Can You Expect?**
* Career Path: Start with a permanent contract from day one. Over 12 months, experience two rotations across departments and transition into a landing role where you can continue to grow.
* Training & Development: Receive a well-structured, dedicated Project Management training program, tailored to strengthen your ability to lead projects and deliver results. Plus, gain access to a wide range of learning opportunities through our Digital PayTech University, empowering you to continuously build your skills and expand your knowledge.
* Impact & Networking: Contribute to real business solutions and expand your network by working alongside talented colleagues and senior leaders from across Europe.


**Who are We Looking For?**
 If this sounds like you, we encourage you to apply:
   

  

* You have graduated within the past 12 months or will graduate within the next 6 months with a master’s degree in Engineering, STEM disciplines, Business, or related fields, and are available to work full-time.
* You are fluent in English and Swedish.
* You bring international experience, whether through study, work abroad, or collaboration in a global environment.
* You are a career starter with no more than one year of professional experience.
* You have the legal right to work in Sweden (e.g., residency, visa).
* You are committed, curious, and eager to take ownership of projects while thriving in a team environment.
* You see formal training as just the beginning and aim to make a difference in everything you do.


**Diversity, Equity and Inclusion**
 We are committed to building a diverse culture where talents from all walks of life feel they truly belong. By applying to our Graduate Program, you are one step closer to joining us. Next starts with you, everyday.
   

  

**Apply Now!**
 Don't miss out on this amazing opportunity. Apply today and discover what's in it for you!
   

  

 Please ensure both your CV and all answers in the application form are completed in English.
   

  

**About Us**
 Are you interested in joining one of Europe's leading PayTech companies?
   

  

 Do you want to be part of a diverse team, collaborating with colleagues from across Europe? If so, you're in the right place!
   

  

**About The Team**
 We are the result of merging Nexi, Nets, and Sia, with a presence in over 25 countries. With over 80 years of experience, we offer plenty of opportunities for personal and professional growth
   

  

 At Nexi, we learn, adapt, and think like entrepreneurs. Discover more about our culture by visiting this page: https://www.nexigroup.com/en/people/life-at-nexi/overview/?utm\_source=career-platform&utm\_medium=job-openings&utm\_content=about-the-team

title: Senior IT-Konsult - TAM (Malmö, Stockholm, Göteborg)
description:
Trivs du med att arbeta självständigt som IT-konsult i en bred roll där du får ansvar för våra kunders tekniska utveckling? Då kan du vara personen vi söker
   

  

**Om jobbet**
 Vi på InfraCom söker nu en senior IT-konsult för att stärka vår konsultverksamhet och för att hjälpa våra kunder i deras digitala resa. Vi söker dig som trivs med att arbeta nära kund i roll som TAM eller liknande, och som är bekväm med att föra både tekniska och affärsmässiga dialoger med kunder. Du tar med hjälp av dina kollegor ett helhetsansvar för vår leverans till kund och bistår kunden med allt från strategisk rådgivning till till tekniskt utförande.
   

  

 Hög service och en lösningsorienterad inställning är nyckelord. Du ska kunna samverka på ett bra sätt i vår organisation och intern service är lika viktig som den du ger våra kunder.
   

  

 Du kommer ingå i ett mycket kompetent team och att arbeta med tekniska frågeställningar och framtagande av lösningar.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
* Krav på minst 5 års erfarenhet av kundorienterat konsultarbete
* Goda kunskaper inom lösningar baserade på Microsofts plattformar
* Microsoft 365 - Entra ID, InTune, Defender
* Azure - server och nätverk, IaaS och PaaS
* Goda kunskaper inom Microsoft server/klient-miljö
* God kunskaper inom nätverk
* Meriterande - Certifieringar inom relevanta områden
* Meriterande - Erfarenhet av projektledning


**Vad erbjuder vi?**
* En karriär i ett framgångsrikt och föränderligt IT-bolag med stora utvecklingsmöjligheter
* Möjlighet att påverka dina arbetsuppgifter och företagets utveckling
* Trevliga och drivna medarbetare med engagemang och öppenhet
* Konkurrensmässiga löner och villkor, tjänstepension och friskvårdsbidrag
* Gemensamma aktiviteter som AWs och årliga kickoffer


**Om InfraCom Group AB**
 InfraCom Group AB (publ) är en ledande aktör inom IT-infrastruktur. Sedan 1999 erbjuder vi tjänster inom mobil- och fasttelefoni, molnväxel, internet via fiber, server, hosting och webbplattformar. Vi har mer än 30 000 kunder, främst inom SME-segmentet samt offentlig förvaltning.
   

  

* Omsättning: ca 800 miljoner
* Ca 300 medarbetare
* +20 kontor
* Certifierade enligt ISO9001, ISO14001 och ISO27001
* Anslutna till kollektivavtal


**Placering** 
 : Utgångspunkt är Göteborg, Malmö eller Stockholm men vi är även öppna för placering vid något av våra andra kontor. Se vår hemsida för information var vi finns.
   

  

**Start** 
 : Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

**Omfattning** 
 : Heltid
   

  

**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan**
 Urval och intervjuer sker löpande vilket innebär att tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas före sista ansökningsdag. Har du frågor kring rollen eller din ansökan vänligen kontakta Konsultchef thomas.nilsson@infracom.se

title: Video & Content producer
description:
**We're Hiring: Video & Content Producer Intern (Stockholm)** 




 We're looking for a highly driven content creator to join Nuro AI.
 



  





 At Nuro AI, we're building technology to help neurodivergent students get the support they deserve. We're a young team, many of us neurodivergent ourselves, building a fast-growing startup at one of the leading startup incubators in the Nordics.
 



  





 We're not looking for someone with years of experience.
 



 We're looking for someone who loves creating content, enjoys filming and editing videos, and believes they can become great at it.
 



  





**You might be a fit if you're:** 



* Self-driven and
 **have high agency**
* Creative and full of ideas
* Positive and outgoing
* Fast-moving and proactive
* Kind and easy to work with
* Eager to learn and improve every day
* Know how to handle a camera



  





**What you'll do:** 



* Film and create content for LinkedIn, Instagram and TikTok
* Edit short-form videos and experiment with new formats
* Work directly with our founders to build the Nuro AI brand



  





 Most of the work happens on-site with the team in Stockholm.
 



 We don't care what editing software you use. We care about creativity, execution and your willingness to learn and preform well!
 



  





 You'll be mentored by our CEO, who has 10+ years of marketing experience, and you'll get hands-on experience building a startup from the ground up.
 



  





 No professional experience? That's okay.
 



 Send us your CV and examples of content you've made. If you don't have a portfolio, send us your TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, or anything else that shows us what you can create.
 



  





 📍 Stockholm (on-site, with remote editing)
 



 📩 Apply by email - isabella@nuroai.dev
 



 #Hiring #Internship #ContentCreator #VideoEditor #StartupJobs #EdTech #AI #Stockholm

title: IT Operations Specialist
description:
Stories have the power to make the ordinary extraordinary. They help us think bigger, see beyond ourselves, and deepen our connection with others.
   

  

 As one of the world's leading audiobook and e-book streaming platforms, Storytel brings unlimited listening to millions of users across 25 markets.
   

  

 Driven by our purpose, "Leading the future of storytelling, we move the world through stories", Storytel Group inspires and entertains people around the world by blending innovation with tradition. We bring stories to life across various formats for everyone to discover. Anytime. Anywhere.
   

  

**Ready for your next chapter? We're looking for an IT Operations Specialist to join our team in Stockholm!**
**About The Role**
 Do you want to architect, develop, and take technical ownership of modern cloud Digital Workplace platforms while remaining hands-on, managing daily operations and handling routine workplace IT tasks?
   

  

 The IT Operations team is currently scaling our responsibilities and operations.
   

  

 While Storytel’s core IT landscape is primarily built around Google Workspace and macOS, we are in an exciting phase where we are taking over the IT responsibility for companies within the group that mainly operate on Microsoft 365. We are looking for this role to act as the technical bridge for this expansion, which brings an exciting increase in technical complexity, multi-tenant environments, and global reach.
   

  

 In this role, you will step into a vital and highly versatile position. While your primary focus will be acting as our internal driver for MDM and Microsoft 365 governance, this is a broad role where you will manage and work across a wide array of different systems, applications, processes, and projects. Simultaneously, you will remain hands-on, supporting the team in daily operations and taking ownership of Workplace IT.
   

  

**Growth & Opportunities**
 For an ambitious candidate who successfully takes ownership and elevates our MDM and M365 environments, there are great opportunities to gradually shape the role and dive deeper into specialized infrastructure engineering and governance as our landscape evolves.
   

  

 Core Responsibilities
   

  

* MDM Evolution & Management: Take ownership of managing and developing our device management across our hybrid device fleet with Microsoft Intune and Jamf. You will architect, build, and maintain secure device configurations while also focusing on creating a great user experience with a distinct Storytel look and feel across all endpoints.
* M365 & Identity Governance: Architect, configure, and manage our Microsoft 365 environments within a complex multi-tenant structure. These environments are tightly integrated with Okta as part of an advanced identity architecture, utilizing HRiS as a Source
* SaaS System Administration: Daily administration, user lifecycle management, and optimization of various SaaS systems used and provided across the group.
* IT Projects & Continuous Improvement: Actively lead and execute various internal IT projects. You will be a driving force behind onboarding new group environments and constantly leveling up our technical setup.
* Vendor Management & Procurement: Manage relationships and contracts with external IT vendors, hardware suppliers, and SaaS providers. You will oversee software licensing, optimize procurement processes, and ensure we partner with the right external stakeholders.


**Operational & Workplace Responsibilities**
* Office & AV technology: Driving the continuous improvement and development of our office technology and meeting rooms, while overseeing daily operations and support
* IT-Equipment Management: Managing IT equipment lifecycle operations (procurement, inventory logistics, and on/offboarding setups) for a device fleet consisting primarily of MacBooks, alongside an increasing number of Windows devices.
* Daily IT-support: Handling a broad variety of daily support requests from our end-users, both on-site and remote. Ranging from complex technical troubleshooting to routine, autopilot tasks


**Requirements & Qualifications**
* Technical Experience: At least 3–5 years of experience working within IT operations, modern workplace management, or system administration.
* MDM & M365 Expertise: Proven experience configuring and administering Microsoft Intune (device configuration, compliance policies, deployment) and managing Microsoft 365 environments. Experience with multi-tenant setups is a major plus.
* Hands-on IT Support: Solid experience handling day-to-day workplace IT, end-user support, and hardware lifecycle management.
* Advanced Workstation & OS Expertise: Deep technical knowledge of both Windows and macOS ecosystems, naturally becoming the go-to person in the team for anything related to computer management and troubleshooting.
* Bonus Platform Knowledge: Experience with Okta, Google Workspace and Jamf is a strong advantage.
* Language: Professional fluency in English, both written and spoken.


**Who You Are**
 To thrive in this position, we are looking for a specific mindset and personality. We believe you recognize yourself in the following:
   

  

* Autonomous & Driven: You don't wait for instructions. You identify what needs to be done, set your own agenda, and drive your initiatives to completion with high energy.
* AI-Forward & Efficiency-Minded: You have a strong understanding of how to leverage AI to optimize your work. Actively finding ways to integrate AI into our systems to automate processes is critical to your success in this role.
* Genuinely Tech-Savvy: You love technology and are motivated by continuous improvement. You take great pride in delivering high-quality, stable, and well-structured solutions.
* People-Centric & Service-Minded: You are a genuine "people person" who excels at building relationships. You will interact extensively with users both at the office and in various other contexts, making a highly service-oriented mindset and strong interpersonal skills essential.
* Humble & Versatile (Prestigeless): You move seamlessly between high-level cloud architecture and helping a colleague with an urgent hardware issue. You are ready to work broadly and jump in wherever the team needs you most.
* Process-Minded: You have a natural ability to see the bigger picture and design structured, scalable processes rather than relying on ad-hoc fixes.


**Location & Workplace**
 We operate on trust, meaning you have the freedom to manage your own calendar, shape your week, and adjust your daily working hours to fit your life.
   

  

 Since a vital part of your role involves managing our physical office ecosystem and hands-on device troubleshooting, this role naturally relies on your physical presence at our Stockholm HQ on a daily basis. However, you will have autonomy over your daily calendar and how you pace your hours.
   

  

 What We Offer
   

  

 A role with high autonomy, immense learning potential, and the chance to leave your mark on a global IT infrastructure from day one. You will join a skilled team that values initiative, continuous learning, and having fun along the way.
   

  

 Join a world of stories
   

  

 At Storytel, we're a team of creative story lovers who thrive on collaboration and new ideas. Our workplace is friendly, dynamic, and full of opportunities to experiment and make an impact. We believe in trust, flat hierarchies, and empowering you to grow with us.
   

  

 Does this sound like your next story? Simply fill out the application form and share your CV or LinkedIn profile.
 **Please include your portfolio with your application.** 
 Answer a few questions, and you're all set.

title: Supporttekniker
description:
*Vinge är en av Nordens största advokatbyråer med ca 580 anställda. Verksamheten är inriktad på affärsjuridik och uppdragen är till stor del internationella. Vinge har kontor i Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö samt i Bryssel och ingår i Lex Mundi, ett globalt nätverk för oberoende advokatbyråer.*
**Supporttekniker till Vinge i Stockholm**
 Vill du arbeta i en verksamhet som ställer höga krav på kvalitet och leverans och där IT och modern teknik står högt på ledningens agenda? Hos oss får du chansen att arbeta i en varierad roll där du gör skillnad i användarnas vardag, samtidigt som du utvecklas inom IT-support i en professionell och stöttande miljö.
   

  

  

  

**Om tjänsten** 
  

  

 Vi söker nu en Supporttekniker till vår helpdesk vid vårt kontor i Stockholm. Som Supporttekniker hos oss står både människor och teknik i centrum. I rollen arbetar du i huvudsak med användarsupport, dels genom bemanning av den gemensamma helpdesken, per telefon samt på plats på kontoret. Dina arbetsuppgifter varierar och kan bland annat innebära felsökning och installation av Windows-datorer samt Apple-telefoner, hantering av skrivare och konferensteknik, enklare felsökning av hårdvara och nätverk samt viss applikationssupport (framför allt inom Office-paketet).
   

  

  

  

**Dina egenskaper**
 Vi letar efter dig som har en naturlig känsla för service och ser utmaningar som något att ta sig an – inte något att undvika. Du motiveras av att leverera kvalitet i varje steg och har ett genuint intresse för både människor och IT. Engagemang präglar ditt sätt att arbeta, och du trivs med att ta ansvar, arbeta strukturerat och driva dina uppgifter framåt på egen hand. Samtidigt värdesätter du samarbetet med kollegor och uppskattar att nå mål tillsammans. Även när tempot är högt behåller du fokus och ett lösningsorienterat förhållningssätt.
   

  

 Är det dig vi söker? Vi ser fram emot att läsa din ansökan, varmt välkommen med den redan idag!
   

  

  

  

**Vi ser gärna att du:**
* Har en gymnasial utbildning
* Har ett par års erfarenhet av arbete i en helpdesk eller som teknisk kundsupport.
* Är flytande svenska i tal och skrift
* Har mycket goda kunskaper i engelska
* Har goda kunskaper i Microsoft 365, Windows operativsystem och Officepaketet
* Vi ser det även som meriterande om du har:
* Tidigare erfarenhet av arbete inom service.


**Omfattning och tillträde**
 Denna roll är en tillsvidaretjänst som inleds med en provanställning. Du kommer arbeta på plats från vårt Stockholmskontor och startdatum är enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

  

  

**Ansökan** 
  

  

 Vi kommer arbeta löpande med urval, vilket betyder att tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag – så skicka gärna in din ansökan redan idag! Processen kommer bestå av tester (logik och personlighet), intervjuer, referenstagning samt bakgrundskontroll.

title: System Architect E-handel till Axfood IT, Stockholm
description:
**Samtliga ansökningar behandlas under augusti 2026, i samband med rekryteringsprocessens start.**
 Välkommen till Axfood IT, en av matbranschens största IT-avdelningar med nästan 400 medarbetare. Det är vi som ser till att Axfood, och alla våra kedjor, kan ligga i framkant vad gäller digital utveckling. Vi jobbar med att utveckla och förbättra allt ifrån e-handel till logistiklösningar och AI.
   

  

 Hos Axfood IT blir du del av ett sammanhang som utmanar och levererar lösningar som gör skillnad, både för våra kollegor och våra kunder. Här finns det alltid möjlighet att lära sig om ny teknik och växa, både som individ och tillsammans med kollegorna.
   

  

**Ditt nya team**
 Du blir en del av e-handelsområdet på Axfood IT och arbetar med de digitala kundupplevelserna för Willys och Hemköp. Här utvecklas och förvaltas några av Sveriges största e-handelsplattformar inom dagligvaruhandeln, lösningar som används av hundratusentals kunder varje vecka.
   

  

 E-handeln är ett område med hög förändringstakt och stora tekniska krav. Det handlar om allt från checkout och kundupplevelse till integrationer, tillgänglighet, prestanda och skalbarhet vid hög trafik. Den tekniska miljön består av SAP Commerce Cloud (CCV2), AWS och egenbyggda microtjänster, integrationer och lösningar.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som System Architect har du en viktig roll i utvecklingen av Axfoods e-handelsplattformar. Du ansvarar för att skapa hållbara och skalbara lösningar som klarar höga volymer, många integrationer och komplexa beroenden mellan system och team.
   

  

 Rollen är både strategisk och verksamhetsnära. Du arbetar nära lösningsarkitekter och team för att säkerställa att lösningar följer arkitekturprinciper, teknikstrategi och säkerhetskrav, samtidigt som du hjälper organisationen att fatta långsiktigt hållbara tekniska beslut.
   

  

**Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer bland annat att inkludera:**
* Samverka med lösningsarkitekter kring kostnadseffektiv design och arkitektur
* Driva förbättringar kopplat till prestanda, driftkostnader och teknisk kvalitet
* Säkerställa att e-handelslösningar är säkra, skalbara och långsiktigt hållbara
* Ta fram datamodeller, scenariobeskrivningar och designrekommendationer
* Fatta tekniska beslut kring förändringar i system och integrationsflöden
* Bidra till att utveckla Axfoods teknikstrategi och arkitektoniska principer tillsammans med arkitektkollegor


**Stämmer detta in på dig?**
 För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du är senior inom systemarkitektur och tycker om att navigera i komplexa miljöer där många system och intressenter behöver samverka. Du är trygg i tekniska diskussioner, har ett strategiskt perspektiv och uppskattar att arbeta tillsammans med andra för att hitta hållbara lösningar.
   

  

**Vi tror också att du har:**
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta som System Architect eller i en liknande arkitekturroll
* Arbetat inom e-handel eller annan komplex verksamhet med många beroenden och integrationsflöden, exempelvis inom bank eller försäkring
* God kunskap inom microtjänstarkitektur, molnbaserade lösningar och moderna integrationsmönster
* Förståelse för säkerhet, skalbarhet och kostnadseffektiv systemdesign
* Erfarenhet av att samarbeta nära både utvecklingsteam och verksamhetsnära roller


 Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av AWS och SAP-lösningar, såsom Hybris eller CCV2.
   

  

 Stämmer du inte in på varje punkt? Sök ändå! Vi vet att potential ofta är viktigare än erfarenhet och går igenom alla ansökningar.
   

  

**Ansökningsprocessen**
**Ansökan till denna roll ligger ute över sommaren, men ansökningar kommer bahandlas först i augusti. Du är välkommen med din ansökan redan nu!**
 Vi vill att det ska vara enkelt att söka jobb hos oss. Om du inte har ett CV redo räcker det med att du länkar en väl ifylld LinkedIn-profil. I din ansökan får du svara på de frågor vi behöver svar på i den här delen av processen, och personligt brev är därför inte obligatoriskt. Vår rekryteringsprocess innehåller tester, intervjuer, bakgrundskontroll och ID-kontroll. Observera att vi inte under denna rekryteringsprocess kommer be dig logga in med ditt Bank-id eller scanna någon QR-kod, men vi kommer be dig styrka din identitet i processens slutskede.
   

  

 Vid frågor om rekrytering på Axfood, kontakta Medarbetarsupporten eller läs mer: Så går det till när du söker jobb inom Axfood. Om du har frågor om tjänsten, kontakta elisabeth.wehlin@axfood.se. Av GDPR-skäl behandlar vi inga ansökningar eller annan personlig information via mail.
   

  

 Läs mer och se filmer om Axfood som arbetsgivare här: Din karriärväg hos Axfood | Utveckling och möjligheter | Axfood

title: Platform Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is redefining how legal work gets done. Not built for lawyers, built with them. We work alongside the world’s best legal teams, who expect excellence, precision, and speed, and we hold ourselves to the same bar.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace lets legal professionals move faster, think more clearly, and operate with sharper precision. By analysing thousands of documents in minutes and powering end-to-end workflows, we cut through complexity, teams can focus on what matters: judgment, strategy, and outcomes.
   

  

 1,000+ customers across 50+ countries trust us, including Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Linklaters, White & Case, Dentons, and Barclays. We’ve scaled to
 **$100M+ in ARR** 
 , with teams across Europe, North America and APAC, and continue to expand through acquisitions including Qura, Walter AI and Graceview.
   

  

 We partner with world-class performers: including Aaron Judge and the New York Yankees, Ludvig Åberg (and his caddie), and campaigns featuring Jude Law.
   

  

 Joining Legora means three things.
   

  

* We lean in: ownership over titles, outcomes over intentions.
* We fight for excellence: high standards, direct, ego-free feedback.
* We grow together: as a team and with our customers.


 Mission before ego. Everyone contributes. No one coasts.
   

  

 If you’re driven by impact, pace, and raising the bar. This is the place.
   

  

**The role**
 As a
 **Platform Engineer** 
 at Legora, you’ll join an enabling team focused on making life easier for developers. Your mission: improve reliability, boost performance, and build a rock-solid platform that scales with the company. You'll work hands-on across infrastructure and backend systems, helping teams ship faster, safer, and smarter.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Build the core infrastructure and reliability abstractions that all our engineering teams use
* Sit with all teams and help them structure their SRE efforts: observability, alerting, fault tolerance and reliability
* Proactively monitor our infrastructure and develop it for hyperscale and reliability
* Contribute to incident response and post-incident learning
* Work with Pulumi on primarily Azure, but also AI deployments on AWS and GCP


**Who You Are**
* You have years of experience as a backend engineer but have solid infrastructure, observability, monitoring know-how
* Experience with Kubernetes
* Experience with Pulumi (preferred) or similar IaC tools like AWS CDK, Terraform
* But most importantly, you are someone who
+ “Gets stuff done” and understands building a $10bn company isn’t always glamorous and takes hard work and long hours
+ Proactively and independently solves the most burning problems
+ Strives in a fast-paced environment where the answers aren’t always clear and processes are few


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Information Security Manager
description:
**Job Description**
 Information Security Manager
   

  

**Remote/Hybrid, Stockholm, Sweden**
 Do you want to work in a strategically important role where information security, regulatory compliance, IT security, and business value connect? We are now looking for an
 **Information Security Manager (ISM)** 
 who wants to take overall responsibility for information and IT security in complex customer and delivery environments.
   

  

 As an Information Security Manager, you are the central point of contact for security matters in customer engagements. The role combines governance, advisory, and follow-up, ensuring that both the customer's and the organization's security requirements, standards, and contractual obligations are met.
   

  

 You will work closely with customers, delivery teams, Service Delivery Management, Security Operations Center (SOC), and other key functions. The role is non-operational but requires a strong technical understanding and a high level of security maturity.
   

  

 As Our Future Information Security Manager , You Will
   

  

* Be the single point of contact for security in customer engagements
* Ensure compliance with information security requirements, agreements, and internal standards
* Establish, manage, and follow up on the information security risk register
* Lead and participate in various levels of security forums with our customers and conduct security reviews
* Prepare and present monthly security reporting
* Contribute to and maintain development plans from a security perspective
* Support during security incidents, investigations, and escalations
* Review security aspects in changes (Change Assessment)
* Ensure that architecture and design documents are reviewed from a security perspective
* Create, manage, and follow up on delivery-specific security handbooks and plans.
* Collaborate with sales and identify business opportunities within security


**Your profile**
 You are proactive, structured, and analytical, with a strong sense of responsibility.
   

  

 You have got several years of experience in information security work and several years of experience in IT security, preferably in a technical role.
   

  

 You possess both practical and theoretical knowledge of ISMS, risk management, incident management, and compliance follow‑up. You have experience working closely with customers in complex IT and operational environments and the ability to work in a structured, independent, and advisory manner. You also have excellent communication skills in both Swedish and English, spoken and written, and you have documented experience in leading security work at an account level or equivalent.
   

  

 It is considered a strong merit if you have experience of working with established frameworks and standards, and have experience from managed services or larger outsourcing contracts.
   

  

**What is in it for you?**
* A business ‑ critical and visible role with significant trust and responsibility
* The opportunity to influence and develop security work for major customers
* Collaboration with experienced specialists in security, operations, and architecture
* A flexible way of working with possibility to work remotely part time
* A professional environment where information security is a strategic priority


**Shape your world and achieve together**
 We want the best people on our team, so we welcome and encourage applications from people with a diverse variety of experiences, backgrounds, and identities. We are committed to equality of opportunity for all. If you want to work alongside people with different ideas, in an inclusive business that will welcome you and support you, come and co-create the future at Fujitsu.
   

  

**About Fujitsu**
 Since being founded in Japan in 1935, we have continued to demonstrate our technological prowess and the persistent pursuit of innovation. As a world-leading digital transformation partner, our business structure is aligned with the modern digital world. We use our experience and the power of IT to shape the future of society with our customers.
   

  

***For the consultant/employee selected for the role, checks of public registers and records relating to financial and legal status will be conducted. By submitting an application, the candidate consents to such checks being carried out.***

title: Security Architect
description:
**Job Description**
 We are looking for a
 **pragmatic and experienced Security Architect** 
 to join our organization. This role is not about writing policies for the sake of policies – it is about
 **designing security that works in real environments** 
 .
   

  

 You will support our customers and internal teams by translating security, regulatory, and business requirements into
 **practical, sustainable, and implementable security solutions** 
 . You will be involved early in customer engagements and play a key role in ensuring
 **Security by Design** 
 across architectures, platforms, and services.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 As a Security Architect with us, you will work on several levels:
   

  

* Support new customer engagements by understanding security, regulatory, and business requirements and translating them into concrete security architectures and solutions
* Design security as an integrated part of IT solutions – Security by Design, not bolted‑on controls
* Advise architects, delivery teams, and customers on security‑related decisions across infrastructure, applications, services and cloud
* Perform practical assessments of solutions and environments against relevant industry standards and frameworks
* Support internal improvement initiatives related to security architecture, governance, and compliance
* Act as a bridge between technical teams, security requirements, and business needs


 The focus should always be on
 **outcome and usability** 
 , not theoretical perfection.
   

  

**Who We Are Looking For**
 You are a
 **hands‑on security architect** 
 who enjoys solving real problems and working close to both customers and delivery teams.
   

  

**We Believe You Have**
* Several years of experience working with security architecture in real delivery environments
* Strong ability to translate requirements into solutions, not just documents
* A practical understanding of Security by Design principles
* Experience working with standards and frameworks such as ISO 27001, NIST, NIS2, CIS Controls, or similar
* Experience engaging with customers, understanding their needs, and advising on security matters
* The confidence to challenge solutions when security is not good enough – and propose better alternatives


**Your profile**
 You are proactive, structured, and analytical, with a strong sense of responsibility.
   

  

 This role is intended for a
 **Security Architect** 
 who has reached their level through
 **several years of hands‑on experience** 
 in security architecture roles.
   

  

**We Are Looking For Someone Who Is**
* Strongly solution‑oriented – you focus on how security is actually implemented and works in practice
* Experienced in making architectural security decisions in real customer and delivery environments
* Comfortable taking ownership and responsibility for security outcomes, not just recommendations
* Used to balancing security requirements, technical constraints, and business needs


 You have built your seniority by
 **designing, assessing, and improving real security solutions** 
 , and you are confident working independently while collaborating closely with architects, engineers, technicians, project managers and customers.
   

  

 You have experience working closely with customers in complex IT and operational environments and the ability to work in a structured, independent, and advisory manner. You also have excellent communication skills in both Swedish and English, spoken and written, and you have documented experience in leading security work at an account level or equivalent.
   

  

**What is in it for you?**
* A key role with real influence over how security is designed and implemented
* The opportunity to work close to customers and technical teams
* Complex and meaningful security challenges in modern IT environments
* A professional, collaborative culture with a strong focus on delivery and trust


 The role requires security clearance, background checks, and Swedish citizenship.

title: Systemingenjör
description:
HiQ söker nu en systemingenjör till vårt team i Stockholm. Vi är ett av Sveriges mest tekniktunga och spännande konsultbolag, med kunder inom en rad olika branscher. Som konsult hos oss får du tillgång till ett brett utbud av spännande uppdrag hos välkända svenska företag.
   

  

**Om rollen:**
 Som System Engineer hos oss arbetar du i gränslandet mellan inbyggd hårdvara, Python och C#/.NET samt moderna DevOps-inspirerade arbetssätt. Du blir en del av team där labbmiljöer, testuppställningar och molnnära system är en naturlig del av vardagen. Du är med från krav till verifierad lösning och ser till att helheten fungerar, från fysiska enheter till kringliggande verktyg och applikationer. I rollen ingår både nyutveckling, vidareutveckling och integration, ofta i nära samarbete med specialister inom både hårdvara och mjukvara.
   

  

**Du kommer att:**
* integrera hårdvarukomponenter, inbyggd mjukvara och applikationer till fungerande systemlösningar
* utveckla verktyg och stödsystem i Python och C#/.NET för konfigurering, övervakning, test och produktionsstöd
* ta fram och automatisera systemtester och integrationstester, gärna kopplat till CI/CD-flöden
* arbeta praktiskt i labb med utrustning, riggar, mätinstrument och loggning samt dra slutsatser från resultat
* bidra till mer automatiserade och repeterbara flöden för bygg, test, flashing och leverans av system
* samarbeta tätt med produktägare, testare och ingenjörer inom flera discipliner för att reda ut krav och hitta hållbara lösningar


**Vi söker dig som har:**
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet som systemingenjör eller en liknande roll.
* Ingenjörsexamen inom teknisk fysik, datateknik, maskinteknik, farkostteknik, eller motsvarande.
* God förståelse för arkitektur och systemdesign.
* Erfarenhet av system där hårdvara och mjukvara samverkar
* Goda kunskaper i Python samt C#/.NET
* Erfarenhet av versionshantering som exempelvis Git
* Kunskaper inom CI/CD-flöden
* Svenskt medborgarskap och flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av försvarsindustrin är meriterande, men inte ett krav.
* Kunskaper i kravhanteringsverktyg och erfarenhet av designdokumentation.
* Erfarenhet av Linux som utvecklingsmiljö eller testplattform


**Personliga egenskaper:**
 Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper och letar efter dig som är flexibel och kommunikativ som trivs i en miljö där förändringar är en del av vardagen. Du värdesätter också ett gott samarbete i teamet och delar gärna med dig av dina tidigare erfarenheter till dina kollegor.
   

  

**Varför HiQ**
 Sedan 1995 har HiQ varit konsultbolaget som förenklat världen för både kunder och slutanvändare med hjälp av teknik, design och kommunikation. HiQ har alltid fokuserat på två saker: att ha kul på jobbet och att leverera lösningar utöver förväntningar - det är vad som driver oss framåt! Vi HiQare är stolta över att ha en kultur som präglas av
 **resultat** 
 ,
 **ansvar, enkelhet** 
 och
 **glädje** 
 . Vi tror på att arbeta tillsammans för att nå våra gemensamma mål och strävar efter att hjälpa varandra att fortsätta växa och utvecklas. Hos oss får du utöver chansen att utveckla din egen kompetens också möjlighet att lära, leda och inspirera dina kollegor.
   

  

*I denna rekrytering tillämpar vi löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan ansökningstiden har gått ut. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!*
